ecomm.name: Abandoned Cart
ecomm.description: Users who added to cart but didn't purchase
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: add_to_cart event WITHOUT purchase event within session. Membership: 30 days.
ecomm.alt_method: Shopify 'Abandoned Checkouts' export via Customer Match upload.

ecomm.name: Purchasers
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: purchase event. Membership: 540 days.
ecomm.alt_method: Shopify customer export via Customer Match upload.

ecomm.name: Repeat Purchasers
ecomm.description: Users with 2+ purchases. Best lookalike seed.
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: purchase event count >= 2. Membership: 540 days.
ecomm.alt_method: Shopify segment '2+ orders' via Customer Match. Also excellent as a Klaviyo segment upload.

ecomm.name: Product/Category Page Viewers
ecomm.description: Users who viewed product or collection pages but didn't purchase
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: page_view where page_location contains /products/ or /collections/, WITHOUT purchase. Membership: 30 days.

ecomm.name: Engaged Product Page Visitors
ecomm.description: Users who spent 30+ seconds on a product page
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: page_view on /products/ with engagement_time_msec > 30000. Membership: 30 days.

ecomm.name: Checkout Starters
ecomm.description: Users who started checkout but didn't purchase
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: begin_checkout event WITHOUT purchase. Membership: 14 days.

ecomm.name: Email Subscribers (Non-Purchasers)
ecomm.description: Newsletter signups who haven't purchased yet
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: sign_up or generate_lead event WITHOUT purchase.
ecomm.alt_method: Klaviyo segment 'Subscribed, Never Purchased' via Customer Match upload.

ecomm.name: All Site Visitors
ecomm.description: All website visitors for broad remarketing
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: session_start event. Membership: 30-90 days.

ecomm.name: Site Search Users
ecomm.description: Users who searched on the site (high intent)
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: view_search_results event. Membership: 30 days.

ecomm.name: Multi-Page Viewers
ecomm.description: Users who viewed 3+ pages in a session
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: screen_page_views >= 3 within a session. Membership: 30 days.

ecomm.name: Removed from Cart
ecomm.description: Users who removed items from cart (different intent than abandoners)
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: remove_from_cart event. Membership: 14 days. Note: Shopify must fire this event (verify in GA4 DebugView).

ecomm.name: Coupon Code Users
ecomm.description: Price-sensitive buyers who used discount codes
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: purchase event where coupon parameter is not empty. Membership: 180 days.
ecomm.alt_method: Shopify order export filtered by discount_code via Customer Match.

ecomm.name: Video Viewers (Started/Completed)
ecomm.description: Users who watched product or brand videos
ecomm.build_method: YouTube audiences auto-create in Google Ads. On-site: GA4 video_start / video_complete events.

ecomm.name: Special Offer Page Viewers
ecomm.description: Users who viewed sale/promo landing pages
ecomm.build_method: GA4 audience: page_view where page_location contains /sale, /promo, or campaign landing page path. Membership: 14 days.

awareness.name: All Site Visitors
awareness.build_method: GA4 audience: session_start event. Membership: 30-90 days.

awareness.name: Store Locator / Where to Buy Visitors
awareness.build_method: GA4 audience: page_view where page_location contains /store-locator or /where-to-buy.

awareness.name: Video Viewers
awareness.build_method: YouTube audiences (auto-created). On-site: GA4 video_start / video_complete.

awareness.name: Email/Newsletter Subscribers
awareness.build_method: GA4 audience: sign_up or generate_lead event.

awareness.name: Product/Category Page Viewers
awareness.build_method: GA4 audience: page_view on product or category pages.

awareness.name: Lead Form Completers
awareness.build_method: GA4 audience: generate_lead or form_submit event.
